payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Interior white-framed rectangular window fitted with closed white horizontal (venetian) blinds and flanked by dark navy curtains; blinds show a slight bend/tear near the lower-left and the bottom rail is visible, with diffused daylight filtering through the slat gaps — camera approximately 2.0 m away.
